content.text: <font color='#AAAAAA'>Scans your save for script-injected leveled list entries, writes them as a RobCo Patcher .ini file, then wipes the in-save copies so RobCo Patcher maintains them from disk on every load.</font>

<font color='#AAAAAA'>1.  Hard save into a NEW slot (not a quicksave).
2.  Make sure RobCo Patcher is installed.</font>

content.help: Scans the live leveled lists and writes Patch_<your character name>.ini. Safe to run multiple times - existing entries are kept, new ones are added, duplicates are merged, malformed lines are auto-corrected. Also checks for other characters' patch files before running.

content.text: <font color='#AAAAAA'>Alt-tab out and open the .ini file it reports. Skim it to confirm the entries look right. Then click the button below and click Revert.</font>

content.help: Click this after you've opened and checked the generated patch file. It unlocks the Revert button for this session to prevent misclicks.
Purges the live script-injected entries from every leveled list in your save's RAM. Without this step you'd have duplicates when RobCo Patcher re-injects on the next load.

content.text: <font color='#AAAAAA'>Save into a NEW slot, then exit to desktop. RobCo Patcher reads the .ini on startup - a fresh load is required for the patch to apply.</font>

<font color='#AAAAAA'>Patch files are named Patch_<character name>.ini. RobCo Patcher loads every .ini in that folder. The Generate button automatically warns you if it finds files belonging to other characters.</font>
